message:
test(brenner-loop): add comprehensive tests for misc, agents, hypothesis, and operators

- Add misc.test.ts with tests for evidence, confidence, hypothesis-arena, comparison, and research-brief-template
- Add agents.test.ts covering agent roles, personas, dispatch, and formatting
- Add hypothesis.test.ts for card validation, versioning, and scoring
- Add operators.test.ts for all four Brenner operators (level-split, exclusion-test, object-transpose, scale-check)
- Expand existing tests: comparison, errorRecovery, export, session-machine, storage, test-queue, undoManager
- Fix import for getAsymmetryExplanation in misc.test.ts
- Remove invalid 'all: false' coverage option in vitest.config.ts (not supported in vitest v4)

All 3581 tests pass with the build succeeding.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
